summary: Mobile PWA Phase 6 testing completed successfully. All mobile investment wizard features verified including 4-step flow, progress indicator, animations, signature canvas, and success screen. The wizard correctly handles amount input, terms acceptance, signature drawing, and investment submission.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps with navigation items - may cause click interception issues (inherited from previous phases)

passed_tests: Mobile invest wizard shows step indicator with 4 steps (1, 2, 3, 4)
Step indicator shows checkmarks for completed steps (green background)
Step indicator highlights current step (primary color, scale-110)
Progress indicator updates correctly as user advances through steps
Step 1: Shows portfolio info (name, annual rate)
Step 1: Shows balance display ('Доступно $120,103.22')
Step 1: Shows amount input with currency selector (USD)
Step 1: Shows quick amount buttons ($1,000, $5,000, $10,000)
Step 1: Shows duration selector with rates (6 мес. • 10%, 12 мес. • 12%)
Step 1: Shows auto-reinvest toggle ('Авто-реинвестирование')
Step 1: Expected profit card appears when amount entered (+$500,00 за 6 месяцев)
Step 1: 'Продолжить' (Continue) button navigates to Step 2
Step 2: Shows 'Условия договора' (Contract Terms) header
Step 2: Shows contract terms summary (portfolio, amount, duration, rate, profit)
Step 2: Shows terms text ('Подписывая данный договор, я подтверждаю что...')
Step 2: Shows terms checkbox ('Я прочитал и принимаю условия...')
Step 2: Shows guarantees section ('Юридически оформленный контракт', 'Страхование инвестиций')
Step 2: 'Продолжить' button navigates to Step 3 after accepting terms
Step 3: Shows 'Электронная подпись' (Digital Signature) header
Step 3: Shows signature canvas (600x300) with dashed border
Step 3: Shows clear button (refresh icon) for canvas
Step 3: Shows 'Нарисуйте подпись пальцем' instruction
Step 3: Shows final investment summary card ('Итого к инвестированию')
Step 3: 'Подписать и инвестировать' button submits investment
Step 3: Canvas supports mouse/touch drawing events
Step 4: Success screen shows green checkmark icon (animated bounce)
Step 4: Shows 'Инвестиция создана!' (Investment Created!) heading
Step 4: Shows success message about contract ready to download
Step 4: Shows summary card (amount, duration, profit)
Step 4: Shows 'Скачать контракт' (Download Contract) button
Step 4: Shows 'На главную' (Go to Dashboard) button
Navigation between steps works correctly (forward flow)
Unverified users see verification required message (code verified)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: MobileInvestWizard.js line 87 - useEffect has missing dependency 'fetchPortfolio' (ESLint warning, not critical)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile PWA Phase 6 implementation verified. MobileInvestWizard.js component working correctly with 4-step flow. Step 1: Amount/Duration selection with quick amounts and auto-reinvest toggle. Step 2: Terms acceptance with summary and checkbox. Step 3: Signature canvas (600x300) with touch/mouse support. Step 4: Success screen with download contract option. Use JavaScript clicks for fixed bottom CTA buttons. Canvas drawing requires mouse.move/down/up events. Route is /invest/:portfolioId (not /portfolios/:portfolioId/invest). Admin user has verification so can invest. Unverified users see 'Верификация требуется' message.
